attachments.fallback: Easy Method to Export Kerio Connect to New Server? - @mohdkaif002 (Mohd Kaif)
attachments.text: Manually migrating Kerio Connect to a new server can be complicated and time-consuming — but it doesn’t have to be. The MacSonik IMAP Backup Tool makes the entire process quick, easy, and reliable. It lets you move your Kerio Connect mailboxes directly to any IMAP-enabled server while keeping everything intact, including folder structure, email formatting, and attachments. Getting started is simpl…
attachments.title: Easy Method to Export Kerio Connect to New Server? [How-to Discussions]
